message:
chore: add geodesic benchmark target, optimize race macro, update benchmark data, and fix lints

Miscellaneous cleanup across the codebase:

Build config:
- Cargo.toml: add geodesic_benchmark bench target (harness = false)

Macro optimization:
- asupersync-macros/src/race.rs: remove unnecessary async move { .await }
  wrapper, directly using Box::pin(fut) to eliminate an extra async
  indirection layer

Benchmark data:
- artifacts/raptorq_track_f_wavefront_pipeline_v1.json: updated timing
  data showing improved wavefront pipeline performance across all batch
  size configurations (several deltas flipped from positive to negative)

Lint and formatting fixes:
- circuit_breaker.rs/test: update MAX_HALF_OPEN_PROBES from 2^24 to 2^16
- rate_limit.rs: reformat chained fetch_max() for line-length compliance
- database/mod.rs, postgres.rs: rustfmt reformatting of re-exports and
  long function signatures/assertions
- tls/acceptor.rs: reformat timeout() call indentation
- read_ext.rs, write_ext.rs: add underscore separators to hex literals
  (Clippy unreadable_literal)
- lab/runtime.rs: fix format string referencing renamed _old_time variable
- test_wasm_cross_framework_e2e.sh: hardcode schema version, quote JSON keys

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -84,8 +84,14 @@ sqlite = ["dep:rusqlite"]
 postgres = []
 # Enable MySQL async client with wire protocol.
 mysql = []
-# QUIC/HTTP3 feature flags are intentionally not exposed here yet.
-# Native Tokio-free transport work is tracked under `net::quic_core`.
+# Native QUIC/HTTP3 rollout surfaces (T4.1).
+# These expose Tokio-free native paths for inventory/build/test contracts.
+quic = []
+http3 = ["quic"]
+# Legacy compatibility wrappers over upstream quinn/h3 stacks.
+# Kept explicitly separate from native rollout; disabled by default.
+quic-compat = []
+http3-compat = ["quic-compat"]
 # Enable Kafka client integration via rdkafka.
 kafka = ["dep:rdkafka"]
 # Enable unsafe AVX2/NEON intrinsics for ~8x GF(256) throughput in RaptorQ.
@@ -257,6 +263,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "cancel_drain_bench"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "geodesic_benchmark"
+harness = false
+
 [[bench]]
 name = "homology_benchmark"
 harness = false
@@ -295,7 +305,7 @@ codegen-units = 1
 [lints.rust]
 # Default to deny for unsafe code - specific modules that require it can use #[allow(unsafe_code)]
 # The epoll reactor requires unsafe for the polling crate's FFI operations
-unexpected_cfgs = { level = "warn", check-cfg = ['cfg(loom)', 'cfg(feature, values("quic", "http3", "wasm-browser-preview", "simd-intrinsics"))'] }
+unexpected_cfgs = { level = "warn", check-cfg = ['cfg(loom)', 'cfg(feature, values("quic", "http3", "quic-compat", "http3-compat", "wasm-browser-preview", "simd-intrinsics"))'] }
 unsafe_code = "deny"
 missing_docs = "warn"
 unused = { level = "warn", priority = -1 }

@@ -121,7 +121,7 @@ STEP_HINTS=(
     "Inspect obligation ledger behavior under tab-suspension style timing gaps."
     "Inspect cancellation drain invariants under host interruption timing."
     "Inspect browser replay artifact/report generation pipeline in tests/replay_e2e_suite.rs."
-    "Inspect golden replay-delta drift triage bundle generation in tests/replay_e2e_suite.rs."
+    "Inspect golden replay-delta drift triage bundle generation (golden_trace_replay_delta_triage_bundle.json) in tests/replay_e2e_suite.rs."
 )
 
 STEP_COMMANDS=(
@@ -369,16 +369,16 @@ jq -n \
     --argjson failed_steps "${failed_steps_json}" \
     --argjson step_count "${steps_recorded}" \
     '{
-       schema_version: $schema_version,
-       suite_id: $suite_id,
-       scenario_id: $scenario_id,
-       seed: $seed,
-       started_ts: $started_ts,
-       ended_ts: $ended_ts,
+       "schema_version": "e2e-suite-summary-v3",
+       "suite_id": $suite_id,
+       "scenario_id": $scenario_id,
+       "seed": $seed,
+       "started_ts": $started_ts,
+       "ended_ts": $ended_ts,
        duration_ms: $duration_ms,
-       status: $status,
-       repro_command: $repro_command,
-       artifact_path: $artifact_path,
+       "status": $status,
+       "repro_command": $repro_command,
+       "artifact_path": $artifact_path,
        suite: $suite_id,
        timestamp: $ended_ts,
        test_log_level: env.TEST_LOG_LEVEL,
